svg.title: Chat context transfer flow
svg.desc: How ContextWeave captures a chat session and transfers it to a new chat or model without re-explaining context

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the extension detect which chat platform I am on?')
sendPrompt('What does the extension capture from a chat page?')
sendPrompt('How does the compression work to avoid wasting tokens?')
sendPrompt('How does the context get saved to the Obsidian vault?')
sendPrompt('What does the compressed context markdown file look like?')
sendPrompt('How does the extension inject context into a new Claude chat?')
sendPrompt('How does context transfer work across different LLM models?')
sendPrompt('How does context get injected into Copilot or Claude Code?')

svg.text: Zero re-explanation tokens — context arrives pre-compressed
Chat context transfer — how it works
